span.p:
P0 - Critical
Service Down
< 5 min response

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

P1 - High
Degraded Service
< 15 min response

P2 - Medium
Performance Issues
< 1 hour response
